title: Section 6
content: The degrees, diplomas and other academic distinctions granted or conferred to or on persons by the University shall be recognised by 1[the Central and 2[State] Governments] as are the corresponding degrees, diplomas and other academic distinctions granted by any other University incorporated under any enactment.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1948, for "any Government in British India". 2. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for "Provincial".
